meaning: 横须贺[日本本州岛东南岸港市](军事基地)
examples: Yoshi Ikeda, 34, works at the US Navy Base pool in Yokosuka, Japan.
The aircraft carrier George Washington, which makes its home port in Yokosuka, Japan, and sails with a complete wing of combat aircraft, will lead four other American warships in the joint exercise.

Resumption of operations at the Yokosuka thermal plant would bring in an additional 2.27 GWh of power, and the Niigata No. 5 Thermal plant, adding 110 megawatts (MW).
Japanese derby fans are feasting on the Yokosuka Sushi Rollers.
